job.title: Industrial Electrician, Midland TX
job.subtitle: A staged office replay showing how Tener can feel like a staffed recruiting floor.
job.objective: Make the buyer feel like five specialists are already on the search: sourcing, calibrating fit, opening threads, and surfacing buyer-ready finalists without waiting for a human recruiter to orchestrate every move.
job.phase_label: Opening the office and loading the buyer brief.

agents.name: Reed AI
agents.idle_note: Watching talent channels for stronger leads.

agents.name: Spencer AI
agents.idle_note: Tightening the search brief before the market opens.

agents.name: Harper AI
agents.idle_note: Keeping the fit rubric aligned with the buyer.

agents.name: Jordan AI
agents.idle_note: Waiting for enough evidence to lock the buyer shortlist.

events.phase: Spencer and Harper are turning a rough req into a buyer-specific search brief.

status.label: syncing
status.note: Tightening the role around PLC exposure, OSHA 30 and field leadership.

status.label: reviewing
status.note: Loading buyer tone, team expectations and prior placement signal.

activity.title: Buyer brief opened
activity.detail: The office turned a generic req into a tighter Midland field-search brief before sourcing started.

events.phase: The brief is calibrated and Spencer is handing Reed a cleaner market target.

status.label: sourcing
status.note: Opening external channels with the narrowed spec.

activity.title: Spec handoff
activity.detail: Spencer pushed a sharpened brief to Reed so sourcing starts with fewer false positives.

events.phase: Reed is fanning out across channels while Harper keeps fit constraints tight.

status.label: sourcing
status.note: Running LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed, Rigzone and referral graph in parallel.

status.label: ready
status.note: Keeping the search biased toward practical, low-ego field operators.

activity.title: Search widened with guardrails
activity.detail: Reed opened multiple channels while Harper kept the funnel anchored to field-fit signal.

events.phase: The first evidence packet is strong enough to open outreach without waiting for a recruiter.

status.label: reviewing
status.note: James Mitchell surfaced with strong industrial depth and a clean safety record.

status.label: messaging
status.note: Preparing a personalized intro tied to pay, commute and site context.

activity.title: First candidate packet handed off
activity.detail: Reed promoted James Mitchell into Casey's queue with buyer-fit evidence already attached.

events.phase: Casey is opening real momentum while Reed keeps the market warm behind the scenes.

status.label: messaging
status.note: Sending the first outreach wave with same-day reply prompts.

status.label: sourcing
status.note: Scanning the second page of the funnel for backup finalists.

activity.title: First outreach wave opened
activity.detail: Casey turned the first qualified lead into a live candidate thread while Reed kept sourcing.

events.phase: A fast reply comes back and Casey is routing signal straight into scoring.

status.label: messaging
status.note: James replied quickly, confirmed timing and asked for site details.

status.label: scoring
status.note: Starting a buyer-facing scorecard using fit, safety and responsiveness.

activity.title: Live reply converted into evidence
activity.detail: Casey moved James from outreach into scorecard review as soon as the candidate showed real intent.

events.phase: Jordan is turning candidate signal into a shortlist the buyer can actually act on.

status.label: scoring
status.note: Stack-ranking technical depth, field maturity and response quality.

activity.title: First finalist locked
activity.detail: Jordan promoted James Mitchell as a buyer-ready finalist instead of leaving him buried in the funnel.

shortlist_add.name: James Mitchell
shortlist_add.reason: Strong industrial depth, clean safety history and immediate start signal.

events.phase: Reed and Harper are building depth so the buyer sees options, not a single lucky match.

status.label: sourcing
status.note: A second candidate is emerging from the oil-and-gas and data-center crossover pool.

status.label: reviewing
status.note: Re-checking whether the second candidate still feels buyer-native.

activity.title: Second-wave signal surfaced
activity.detail: The office pulled a second serious operator forward so the buyer sees depth instead of a one-name pipeline.

events.phase: Reed is handing a second qualified lead to Casey while the first finalist stays warm.

status.label: messaging
status.note: Opening a second personalized thread while maintaining the first conversation.

status.label: reviewing
status.note: Roberto's packet is clean enough to move without more manual review.

activity.title: Second outreach wave launched
activity.detail: Casey opened a second candidate thread without losing momentum on the first finalist.

events.phase: The second thread turns warm quickly and Jordan is pulled back into ranking mode.

status.label: messaging
status.note: Roberto replied same-day and confirmed Midland proximity.

status.label: scoring
status.note: Comparing James and Roberto side-by-side for buyer confidence.

activity.title: Second thread escalated
activity.detail: Casey passed a fresh reply to Jordan so the shortlist could become a real buyer choice set.

events.phase: Jordan is now turning a promising funnel into a board the buyer can review immediately.

status.label: ready
status.note: Two finalists are now evidence-backed and ordered by confidence.

activity.title: Second finalist promoted
activity.detail: Jordan added Roberto Garcia to the shortlist so the buyer sees two warm, defendable options.

shortlist_add.name: Roberto Garcia
shortlist_add.meta: Senior Industrial Electrician | Midland, TX | 11 yrs
shortlist_add.reason: Strong infrastructure background, local fit and active conversation momentum.

events.phase: Harper and Spencer are sanity-checking the shortlist against the original buyer brief.

status.label: reviewing
status.note: Making sure both finalists still feel practical, field-tested and low-maintenance.

status.label: syncing
status.note: Verifying the shortlist still matches the brief that opened the search.

activity.title: Buyer confidence check
activity.detail: The office validated that the shortlist still matches the buyer brief, not just the keyword filter.

events.phase: Casey keeps both finalists warm while Jordan packages the board for the buyer.

status.label: messaging
status.note: Sending site details, timing notes and next-step prompts to both finalists.

status.label: ready
status.note: The buyer board is packaged with score, fit context and conversation readiness.

activity.title: Buyer-ready board packaged
activity.detail: The scene closes with two warm finalists, live conversations and a shortlist that looks ready to review.
